homepage.title: Spectro Scientific - Confidence in knowing
homepage.description: Spectro Scientific, an ISO 9001:2015 company, develops a broad array of fluid analysis instruments for evaluating machine and lubricant condition in the field, in the lab and in highly mobile, handheld applications.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Spectro Scientific - Confidence in knowing
LEARN MORE
Oil & Grease Analysis
Oil in Water/Soil Analysis
Fuel Analysis
TruVu 360™ Enterprise now with TruVu 360 Fluid IQ
Simplifies the onsite oil analysis process using advanced analytics and intelligence designed to transform how maintenance teams understand oil health and anticipate equipment needs.
Learn More
MiniLab Series Comprehensive Oil Analysis Lab
With four simple tests, the MiniLab 153 delivers comprehensive on-site oil analysis, providing immediate actionable results, saving time and reducing costs.
MiniLab 153
MicroLab Series All-In-One Automated Oil Analyzer
The MicroLab® combines automation and artificial intelligence in an all-in-one oil analysis tool, making on-site oil analysis possible for any fleet.
Learn More
FieldLab Series Portable Fluid Analysis System
FieldLab 58 is a battery-powered, integrated oil analysis system that provides quick and comprehensive oil analysis in the field.
Learn More
News & Events
TruVu 360 Fluid IQ: AI‑Powered Forecasting
Spectro Scientific Now Offers an E-store for Customers in the United States
Military-Approved Portable Oil Analysis Lab Now Available For Commercial Sale
On-Demand Webinar: Keeping Legacy Power Plants Running With On-Site Oil Analysis
On Demand Webinar: Grease Condition Monitoring: A Guide To Adding Grease Analysis To Your Onsite Lubricant Condition Monitoring Program
On Demand Webinar: On Site Oil Analysis: ROI Analysis For The Reliability Champion
